mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status IN (1, 2)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status IN (1, 2) AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT ROUND(AVG(score), 2) FROM evaluation WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status = 1
SELECT ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1 ) FROM evaluation WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM appointment WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status = 1

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM appointment WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status IN (1, 2) AND created_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} + INTERVAL 1 DAY GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT e.id AS evaluationId, CASE WHEN e.is_anonymous = 1 THEN '匿名用户' ELSE p.name END AS patientName, e.score, e.content, e.is_anonymous AS isAnonymous, e.created_at AS createdAt FROM evaluation e LEFT JOIN patient p ON e.patient_id = p.id WHERE e.doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND e.status = 1 ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status = 1
